audit_items.proof_trace: Double-free occurs in error path when UVector constructor fails: deleteOlsonToMetaMappingEntry(entry) frees the pointer, then uprv_free(entry) frees it again. The deleter itself does not dereference the pointer after freeing.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker triggers memory allocation failure in UVector constructor via timezone ID input, causing double free and potential memory corruption.
